series_metadata.series_description: Timesheets for Administration Building Toll Operations'' employees, Employee Record of Hours, Employee Time Summaries, Lost Time Register, Leave Requests, Record of Overtime, Pay In Lieu of Sick Time, Pay In Lieu of Vacation. 12-month calendars reflecting employee lost time - used in conjunction with Attendance Tracking System.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years. Payroll Department maintains records on a long term basis, Paper: Shred
